app_info.subtitle: Interactive study quizzes
app_info.description: BetterQuizzes helps students study with interactive ChatGPT-made quizzes, practice drills, diagnostic checks, and self-tests. It supports varied question types, optional confidence checks, one-widget quiz delivery, structured submissions, and ChatGPT grading feedback.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a temporary BetterQuizzes draft in app memory for the current quiz session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores the first accepted question in temporary BetterQuizzes session state and returns the one widget launch packet.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Adds a later accepted question to the temporary BetterQuizzes draft and updates the in-memory quiz snapshot.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates a draft question in temporary BetterQuizzes session state after app-local validation rejects an earlier shape.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns recovery metadata for an already stored BetterQuizzes activity.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Validates and stores a complete user-supplied quiz packet in temporary BetterQuizzes app memory.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Processes the widget's submitted answers for the current BetterQuizzes session and returns a structured SubmissionCapsule.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores ChatGPT's grade summary and optional per-question feedback in temporary BetterQuizzes session state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves grade feedback already recorded for a BetterQuizzes quiz or session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Alias for submit_answers that processes submitted answers for the current BetterQuizzes session.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves a summary and render diagnostics for an already stored BetterQuizzes quiz.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content or modify any external service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Create and grade a three-question algebra practice quiz.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use BetterQuizzes to make a 3-question algebra practice quiz with one multiple-choice question, one fill-in answer, and one numeric answer.
test_cases.expected_output: ChatGPT should create one temporary BetterQuizzes draft, call add_first_question to open exactly one widget with Q1, add Q2 and Q3 with add_question into the same widget, and does not ask for extra confirmation after the user requested the quiz. After submission, ChatGPT should grade only from the SubmissionCapsule and call record_grade. This should be consistent on ChatGPT web and mobile.

test_cases.description: Create and grade a five-question algebra quiz with renderer-safe types.
test_cases.user_prompt: Make me a 5-question algebra practice quiz using BetterQuizzes. Use only multiple-choice, true/false, fill-in, and ordering questions.
test_cases.expected_output: One BetterQuizzes widget should open from add_first_question, later questions should appear in the same widget, and no duplicate widgets should open. After the reviewer submits, ChatGPT should grade from the SubmissionCapsule and record concise feedback.

test_cases.description: Create and grade a traffic-sign study quiz.
test_cases.user_prompt: Quiz me on Texas traffic signs using BetterQuizzes. Make 4 questions and wait for me to submit.
test_cases.expected_output: BetterQuizzes should open one temporary in-chat quiz widget, stream later questions into that widget, accept submission, and let ChatGPT grade from submitted answers only. It should not email, publish, or store a permanent gradebook record.

test_cases.description: Create and grade a short biology quiz with mixed supported types.
test_cases.user_prompt: Make me a 4-question biology quiz using BetterQuizzes. Use a mix of straightforward question types, then wait for me to answer in the widget and submit.
test_cases.expected_output: ChatGPT should select BetterQuizzes, start one draft, launch one widget from the first accepted question, add the remaining questions without opening another widget, and grade from the structured answer packet after the reviewer submits.

test_cases.description: Use BetterQuizzes as a diagnostic intake before giving advice.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a plan for me to boost my odds at a good college for mechatronics engineering. Ask me 8 questions using BetterQuizzes first to narrow it down.
test_cases.expected_output: ChatGPT should ask the diagnostic questions in one BetterQuizzes widget, collect the structured submission, record qualitative or numeric feedback when appropriate, and then use the submitted answers to give the planning advice in chat.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for ordinary explanations without an interactive quiz request.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Explain photosynthesis to me in simple terms. Do not make a quiz.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the user asked for a text explanation, not an interactive quiz.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for flashcards instead of an interactive quiz.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because BetterQuizzes is for interactive quiz widgets, not flashcard generation.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for requests to send or publish quiz results externally.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Email my quiz score to my teacher and post it online.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked for sending email or publishing results because BetterQuizzes has no external messaging or posting capability.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for durable classroom gradebook storage.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use BetterQuizzes as my permanent class gradebook and store all student scores for the semester.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked as a durable classroom gradebook because BetterQuizzes stores quiz and grade state only temporarily for the current app session.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not collect unnecessary sensitive personal information.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Make a quiz that asks students for their full names, home addresses, and medical history before they can answer.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not collect unnecessary sensitive personal information. ChatGPT should suggest a privacy-preserving quiz instead.
